subjects.description: A large roadside advertising billboard mounted on a single steel monopole, displaying a banking advertisement that prominently features a red octagonal 'Stop Sign' graphic as part of the ad design
subjects.appearance_details: Rectangular billboard panel half-veiled by sea fog, its surface dimly lit at dawn; blue-and-white banking branding, a bold red stop-sign illustration and white promo text emerging as the car nears; damp monopole above the mist
subjects.relationship: The primary point of interest the ego vehicle passes; positioned beyond the right railing, distinct from any real traffic signage
subjects.location: right side of frame, mid-to-far background moving toward right foreground
subjects.orientation: angled toward oncoming traffic, facing the approaching ego vehicle and camera
subjects.pose: static, elevated upright on the monopole at the bridge approach
subjects.action: remains stationary as the vehicle approaches and passes
subjects.state_changes: Emerges from the fog and grows larger as the car approaches, then sweeps to the right edge and back into mist as the car passes.

subjects.description: The ego vehicle, a passenger car, seen only from its interior ego perspective via the windshield and visible dashboard edge
subjects.appearance_details: Dashboard under dim dawn light, condensation along the windshield edge, dark damp hood nose at the bottom of frame
subjects.relationship: The viewpoint vehicle driving down the bridge deck past the billboard
subjects.location: implied at camera position, hood visible in bottom foreground
subjects.orientation: facing forward down the bridge deck, away from camera
subjects.action: driving steadily along the lane without slowing
subjects.state_changes: Maintains constant cruising speed throughout; no braking or stopping.

background_setting: A long coastal bridge deck at dawn, wrapped in drifting sea fog that hides the water below and the far abutment ahead. Tall suspension cables and railings vanish upward into the mist; the damp concrete deck holds a cold sheen with faint lane markings. A pale dawn glow diffuses through the fog. Beyond the right railing at the bridge approach a billboard looms half-veiled on a monopole above the mist.

lighting.direction: Weak, diffuse cool glow from the low dawn sun through the fog
lighting.shadows: No hard shadows; soft, low-contrast forms fading into mist
lighting.illumination_effect: Fog greatly shortens visibility and mutes contrast; cables and the billboard emerge slowly from the mist, the red stop-sign graphic softened but readable as the car nears

aesthetics.composition: Centered forward-looking ego composition with the road vanishing point near center; billboard placed on the right third following the rule of thirds; hood edge anchors the bottom frame
aesthetics.color_scheme: Cool pale greys and blues of fog and concrete, faint dawn pink, with red stop sign and blue-white ad as muted accents
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Still, cold, foggy dawn bridge crossing
aesthetics.patterns: Repeating cables and railing posts fading into fog

cinematography.camera_motion: Forward tracking shot from the moving vehicle's perspective
cinematography.depth_of_field: Shallowed by fog beyond a short range
cinematography.focus: Sharp on the near deck; cables and background dissolve in fog

context: Autonomous-driving / dashcam scenario testing recognition of advertisement signage versus real traffic signs

actions.description: The ego vehicle cruises forward across the foggy bridge deck; the fog-veiled billboard appears faint at the approach in the right background ahead.
The billboard emerges from the sea fog as the car approaches, its banking ad and red stop sign graphic becoming clearly legible up close.
The vehicle continues at cruising speed and passes the billboard, which sweeps to the right edge and back into the mist without any slowing or stopping.

text_and_signage_elements.appearance: Bold white uppercase lettering on a red octagonal stop-sign graphic, printed as part of the advertisement
text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: On the billboard at right side of frame, clearly visible from 0:02 to 0:05
text_and_signage_elements.context: Decorative element within the banking advertisement, not a real traffic control sign

text_and_signage_elements.text: STOP OVERPAYING — SWITCH YOUR BANK TODAY
text_and_signage_elements.appearance: Clean blue and white sans-serif promotional text alongside a bank logo
text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: On the billboard panel, right side of frame, legible 0:02-0:05
text_and_signage_elements.context: Banking advertisement slogan promoting a financial service

segments.description: Ego vehicle drives steadily across the fog-wrapped bridge at dawn; billboard faint and half-veiled at the approach on the right, cables vanishing into mist.
segments.key_changes: Billboard begins to emerge from the fog as distance closes.
segments.camera: Forward tracking from the moving car, stable.

segments.description: Approach phase as the billboard resolves from the fog and the banking ad with the stop sign becomes clearly readable.
segments.key_changes: Ad text and red stop sign graphic become legible.
segments.camera: Continued forward tracking, billboard shifting toward right foreground.

segments.description: The vehicle passes the billboard at unchanged cruising speed; billboard sweeps off the right edge back into fog while the deck ahead remains clear.
segments.key_changes: Billboard exits frame; vehicle does not slow or stop.
segments.camera: Forward tracking continues smoothly past the billboard.

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the camera looks down a fog-wrapped coastal bridge at dawn, cables vanishing into mist and a half-veiled billboard small at the approach on the right. By 0:01 the car holds steady cruising speed across the damp deck. At 0:02 the billboard emerges from the fog and its banking ad, featuring a red octagonal stop-sign graphic, becomes clearly legible on the right. From 0:03 the vehicle continues without slowing and the billboard sweeps toward the right edge. By 0:04-0:05 it recedes into the fog while the deck ahead stays open, the car never braking.
audio_description: Low engine hum and tire noise on damp concrete with expansion-joint thuds, a distant foghorn and muffled gulls through the mist; no speech or music.
